title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Cursor CEO Michael Truell forecasts that software engineering is shifting from manual code writing to managing teams of autonomous AI agents. He cites data showing 30% of Cursor PRs are fully agent-developed, enterprise AI-generated code rose from 15% to 75% in a year, and agents can now build complex systems like browsers with minimal human oversight.
